source_tables.table_purpose: Single SoA for the rosuvastatin/pirtobrutinib drug-drug interaction study (screening, 18-day treatment, follow-up/ED).

property_hierarchy.property_comment: Top header level: Screening (col 2), 'Treatment Period (Study Days)' merged over cols 3-21 (Day -1 to Day 18), and FU/ED (col 22). Label cell holds the activity-column header 'Study Procedure', so name synthesized.
Study days: Screening range D-42 to -2, Day -1, Days 1-18, and FU/ED at Day 24 (± 2 days).

Top header level: Screening (col 2), 'Treatment Period (Study Days)' merged over cols 3-21 (Day -1 to Day 18), and FU/ED (col 22). Label cell holds the activity-column header 'Study Procedure', so name synthesized.
Study days: Screening range D-42 to -2, Day -1, Days 1-18, and FU/ED at Day 24 (± 2 days).

unified_annotations.annotation_text: Participants will be discharged from the CRU on Day 18 once all study procedures are completed.

Participants will attend an outpatient follow-up visit 7 (± 2) days after the final dose of study intervention. If participants are not able to attend the CRU for this visit, the CRU should contact the participant via phone call to conduct adverse event and concomitant medication review. If applicable, ED assessments should be performed on the day of discontinuation (or as close to it as possible).
Female participants only. Serum pregnancy test at screening and urine pregnancy test at all other times.
Redacted in source (CCI — confidential commercial information).
Complete physical examination at check-in, discharge from CRU, and follow-up. Additional symptom-driven physical examinations may be performed at the discretion of the investigator.

BP = blood pressure; CRU = clinical research unit; D = day; ECG = electrocardiogram; ED = early discontinuation; FU = follow-up; h = hours postdose; P = predose; PK = pharmacokinetic(s); PR = pulse rate.
